limitations under the License.

----

scrcpy bundles or links against the following third-party components
on Windows (shipped inside vendor/scrcpy/ in this distribution):

  * FFmpeg (avcodec, avformat, avutil, swresample, swscale)
    Licensed under LGPL v2.1 or later. Source and build instructions:
    https://ffmpeg.org/download.html

  * SDL2
    Licensed under the zlib license.
    https://www.libsdl.org/

  * libusb
    Licensed under LGPL v2.1 or later.
    https://libusb.info/

For LGPL components, the corresponding source code is available from
the upstream project pages linked above. Users may replace the bundled
library files with their own compatible builds.
